personal-dashboard-risky-article-edits-m: Footer link text for the recent activity module when mobile summary view is enabled which sends the user to Special:RecentChanges with the revertrisklanguageagnostic query parameter set.

Text for displaying the user who made the change on the mobile summary view 

Parameters:
* $1 - the user's name
* $2 - the title of the article they edited
aria-label for navigate to recent changes button
